title: Is being a higher rank lattice a first order property?
abstract: We show that there is a sentence $\varphi$ in the first order language of groups such that a finitely generated group $Γ$ satisfies $\varphi$ if and only if $Γ$ is isomorphic to a group of the form $\mathrm{PSL}_n(O)$, where $n \geq 3$ and $O$ is a ring of $S$-integers in a number field.
